design_philosophy: E1 - Anti-AI Designer. Deep, immersive dark mode focusing on 'Cinematic Tech'. Generous spacing, tension through asymmetry, and emotional direction through specific institution colors illuminating the dark void.

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12. Avoid perfect symmetry.
layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-8, p-12. gap-8 to gap-12 between main sections.

surfaces.navigation: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10. Sticky top-center.
surfaces.cards: Technical Neumorphism: bg-[#0F0F11] border border-[#1F1F22]. Inner padding p-8. No rounded-3xl (use rounded-xl or sharp edges).
surfaces.card_hover: Inject institution color as a subtle glowing radial-gradient (15% opacity) + border color shift.
surfaces.expanded_modal: Solid background matching #050505 but with a massive, diffuse radial glow of the institution's color in the top-right corner.

animations.page_transitions: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Use layoutId for card expansion.
animations.interactions: Cards scale to 1.02 on hover. Smooth color transitions (duration-300).
animations.background_elements: Floating lucide-react icons (Briefcase, GraduationCap, Code) in the far left/right gutters. Opacity 5%, extremely slow infinite Y-axis translation.

components_instructions.hero: Left-aligned content. Massive H1 for Jhonatan Villalba. 'Ingeniero de Sistemas' in JetBrains Mono. Use the profile image with a sleek grayscale filter and a subtle glowing border.
components_instructions.navigation: 3 Top-center buttons ('Formación', 'Experiencia', 'Habilidades'). Must not use generic Shadcn Tabs; build a custom floating pill menu with Framer Motion active background pill.
components_instructions.dynamic_grid: The area below the hero toggles content based on the nav selection. Animate the entrance of the Bento grid cards.
components_instructions.experience_cards: Include the company name, role, and dates. Apply the specific hex color to the hover state and the expanded full-page state.
components_instructions.education_cards: Same pattern as experience. Emphasize the institutional colors (UNE, Santa Teresita, ISO).
components_instructions.skills_section: Bento cells containing densely packed, monochromatic tech icons. On hover, they illuminate with their brand colors.
components_instructions.fullpage_modal: When clicked, the card uses Framer Motion layoutId to become a fixed, full-screen overlay (z-50). It contains deep details, an immersive background (use the provided generated tech images), and a prominent 'Close' or 'Back' button.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid. e.g., 'nav-btn-experiencia', 'card-hive-digital', 'close-modal-btn'.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST use pure HTML/Tailwind and framer-motion for the main interactive Bento Grid to achieve the requested fullpage expansion effect. Do not use restrictive Shadcn wrappers for these cards.
Use 'framer-motion' layoutId to smoothly transition a clicked card into a full-screen view.
Integrate the generated background images into the expanded full-page views, setting them to low opacity (10-20%) with a mask-image to fade into the dark background.
Ensure 'Outfit', 'Manrope', and 'JetBrains Mono' are imported via Google Fonts in index.css.
Add floating icons in the background (using lucide-react) that animate slowly to give the 'fondos laterales mostrando iconos' effect requested by the user.
Strictly follow the color mapping for each institution to dynamically theme the cards and modals upon interaction.
